support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Get help, find answers, or submit a ticket
support.faq1A: You earn 50% recurring commission on every membership your referrals pay — every month they stay active. You also earn from the 8-tier campaign grid (40% direct + 6.25% across 8 uni-level tiers) and course sales. Share your referral link to get started.
support.faq2A: Watch & Earn is the engine that powers the campaign tier grid. When you watch videos, you deliver real views to other members' campaign tiers. This keeps their campaigns active and their commission qualification alive. It is not a standalone earning feature — it is the mechanism that makes the entire affiliate commission structure work.
support.faq3A: Each campaign tier has a grid of 64 positions across 8 levels. When members purchase a tier, they fill positions in their sponsor's grid. Commissions flow at each level. When a grid completes (64 members), the owner receives a completion bonus (up to $3,200) and a new grid opens automatically. You can repurchase tiers to reactivate your qualification and keep earning.
support.faq4A: Withdrawals are paid in USDT on the Polygon blockchain. You need to complete KYC verification (one-time) and have 2FA enabled. Minimum withdrawal is $10. Go to Wallet and request a payout.
support.faq5Q: What's the difference between Basic and Pro?
support.faq5A: Basic ($20/mo) gives you access to the core platform: referral commissions, campaign grid, Watch & Earn, LinkHub, Link Tools, and the Marketing Suite. Pro ($35/mo) adds SuperPages, AI Funnels, email autoresponder, CRM, and the leads dashboard.
support.faq6A: Share your personal referral link: www.superadpro.com/join/[your-username]. You can find it on your dashboard, in Social Share, or generate a QR code for it in the QR Generator. Anyone who signs up through your link becomes your direct referral.

cryptoGuide.title: Crypto Wallet Guide
cryptoGuide.subtitle: Set up your wallet in 5 minutes
cryptoGuide.heroSubtitle: Even if you have never used crypto before
cryptoGuide.heroDesc: SuperAdPro uses cryptocurrency for payments and commissions. This guide walks you through setting up a free wallet in about 5 minutes. No technical knowledge required.
cryptoGuide.step1P1: MetaMask is a free crypto wallet used by over 100 million people worldwide. It works as a browser extension on desktop and as a mobile app on iOS and Android.
cryptoGuide.step1P2: Go to metamask.io and download the official app. Create a new wallet, set a strong password, and you will be given a 12-word recovery phrase.
cryptoGuide.step1Warning: Write your 12-word recovery phrase on paper and store it somewhere safe. Never share these words with anyone — they are the only way to recover your wallet if you lose access.
cryptoGuide.step2P1: SuperAdPro uses the Polygon network because transactions cost less than 1 cent, compared to $5-15 on Ethereum. This means more of your money stays in your pocket.
cryptoGuide.step2P2: In MetaMask, tap the network dropdown at the top of the screen and select "Polygon Mainnet". It is usually pre-loaded — just select it. If you do not see it, tap "Add Network" and search for Polygon.
cryptoGuide.step3P1: Your wallet address is like your bank account number — it is safe to share. In MetaMask, tap your account name at the top to copy your address. It starts with "0x" and is 42 characters long.
cryptoGuide.step3P2: You will need this address to receive commissions from SuperAdPro and to add it to your account settings.
cryptoGuide.step3Tip: Go to your Account page on SuperAdPro and paste your wallet address in the Crypto Wallet section. This is where your commissions will be paid.
cryptoGuide.step4P1: USDT (Tether) is a stablecoin — its value stays at $1. You use USDT to pay for memberships and campaign tiers on SuperAdPro.
cryptoGuide.step4P2: You can buy USDT on any major exchange like Binance, Kraken, or Coinbase. Once purchased, withdraw the USDT to your MetaMask wallet address.
cryptoGuide.step4Warning: Always select "Polygon" as the withdrawal network when sending USDT to your MetaMask. Selecting the wrong network (like Ethereum) means your funds will arrive on a different network and may not be accessible.
cryptoGuide.step4Tip: You will also need approximately $0.50 worth of POL (Polygon's native token) for transaction fees. This small amount is enough for hundreds of transactions.
cryptoGuide.step5P1: Your MetaMask wallet is now set up on Polygon with USDT. You can pay for your SuperAdPro membership, activate campaign tiers, and receive commission payments — all directly to your wallet.
cryptoGuide.step5P2: No payment processor can freeze your funds. No banks involved. Your money, your control. Commissions are paid directly to your wallet address.
cryptoGuide.securityDesc: No payment processor can freeze your funds. Commissions pay out directly to your wallet. No banks, no middlemen, no delays.

platformTour.title: Platform Tour
platformTour.subtitle: Discover everything SuperAdPro has to offer
platformTour.s1_desc: This is your home base. Every time you log in, you land here. You can see your earnings across all income streams, your network size, and your referral link. The Quick Action cards guide you to the most important areas of the platform.
platformTour.s1_tip1: Your referral link is always visible at the top — copy and share it anywhere
platformTour.s1_tip2: The 3 income cards show Membership, Creative Studio, and Campaign earnings
platformTour.s1_tip3: Quick Action cards give you fast access to the most important tools
platformTour.s1_tip4: Your balance is shown at the top right — click it to go to your Wallet
platformTour.s2_desc: SuperAdPro has multiple income streams designed to reward you for building a team and using the platform. Everything flows through a simple principle: refer members, build your network, and earn commissions on their activity. The more active your team, the more you earn.
platformTour.s2_tip1: Membership Referrals — earn 50% recurring ($10 per Basic, $17.50 per Pro) every month your referrals stay active
platformTour.s2_tip2: Campaign Tiers — activate a tier ($20–$1,000) to unlock the 8×8 Income Grid with 40% direct + uni-level commissions across 8 levels
platformTour.s2_tip3: Profit Nexus — your referrals buy Creative Studio credit packs, they enter your 3×3 nexus. Earn level commissions + completion bonuses on every cycle
platformTour.s2_tip4: Course Marketplace (coming soon) — sell digital courses with 100% commission and a pass-up system that creates infinite-depth earning
platformTour.s2_tip5: Visit the Comp Plan page for interactive calculators and the AI assistant that can answer any earnings question
platformTour.s3_desc: Watch To Earn is the engine that powers the entire campaign system. Members with active Campaign Tiers watch short video campaigns daily. This delivers real views to campaign holders while keeping your commission qualification active. Think of it as your daily check-in — a few minutes of watching keeps your earning machine running.
platformTour.s3_tip1: Activate a Campaign Tier first ($20–$1,000) to enter the 8×8 Income Grid
platformTour.s3_tip2: Watch your daily video quota to stay qualified for Campaign Wallet withdrawals
platformTour.s3_tip3: Higher tiers unlock more daily views and bigger grid completion bonuses
platformTour.s3_tip4: Your grid fills with members from your network — when all 64 positions fill, you earn a bonus and a new grid starts
platformTour.s3_tip5: Missing your daily quota pauses Campaign Wallet withdrawals (not your Affiliate Wallet)
platformTour.s4_desc: Every member gets access to a powerful suite of tools included with their membership. These tools work for any business or niche — not just SuperAdPro promotion. Use them to grow your personal brand, create content, track your marketing, and generate AI-powered creative assets.
platformTour.s4_tip1: LinkHub — your personal link-in-bio page (like Linktree). Add your photo, bio, social links, and custom buttons. Share one link everywhere
platformTour.s4_tip2: Link Tools — track clicks on any URL, create link rotators, generate QR codes, and view detailed analytics on all your links
platformTour.s4_tip3: Content Creator — AI-powered writing tool that generates social media posts, captions, hashtags, and marketing copy for any platform
platformTour.s4_tip4: Creative Studio — the full AI creative suite: Video Clips (9 AI models), Full Video production, Images (11 models), Music (Suno AI), Voiceover (32 voices), Lip Sync, Gallery, and Credit Packs
platformTour.s5_desc: Upgrade to Pro ($35/month) to unlock the advanced tools designed for serious marketers. These give you a complete business-in-a-box: build landing pages, create presentations, automate email follow-ups, and let AI build your entire sales pipeline. Pro members also earn higher referral commissions ($17.50 vs $10 per referral).
platformTour.s5_tip1: SuperPages — drag-and-drop landing page builder with 24 block types, gradient builder, responsive preview, and 8 pre-built niche templates
platformTour.s5_tip2: SuperDeck — AI presentation builder. Create professional slide decks with shapes, text, images, and custom styling
platformTour.s5_tip3: AutoResponder (MyLeads) — CRM with up to 5,000 leads, automated email sequences via Brevo, visual timeline, and Pay It Forward integration
platformTour.s5_tip4: SuperSeller — AI Sales Autopilot that generates your entire marketing campaign: landing page, 30 social posts, 5-email autoresponder, 3 video scripts, ad copy, and strategy doc
platformTour.s6_desc: You have two wallets. Your Affiliate Wallet holds membership referral commissions and Creative Studio Profit Nexus earnings — withdraw these anytime with no conditions. Your Campaign Wallet holds grid and watch commissions — these require an active Campaign Tier and daily watch quota. Pay It Forward lets you gift memberships to grow your team organically.
platformTour.s6_tip1: Affiliate Wallet — always withdrawable, no conditions attached
platformTour.s6_tip2: Campaign Wallet — requires active Campaign Tier + daily watch quota to withdraw
platformTour.s6_tip3: Minimum withdrawal is $10 with a $1 fee — paid in USDT cryptocurrency
platformTour.s6_tip4: Set up MetaMask or Coinbase Wallet using the Crypto Guide (under Account)
platformTour.s6_tip5: Pay It Forward — gift a $20 Basic membership to anyone. You become their sponsor and earn commissions on everything they do. When they earn $20+, they are prompted to gift someone else — creating a viral growth chain

publicPages.adBoardDesc: Discover products and services from our community
publicPages.joinCTA: Join SuperAdPro — List Your Products Free
publicPages.listYourProducts: List your products and start earning
publicPages.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know before joining.
publicPages.refundPolicy: All purchases are final and non-refundable.
publicPages.incomeDisclaimer: Income examples shown on this platform are illustrative only. Individual results vary.
publicPages.adBoardPageDesc: Community marketplace — browse listings from members
publicPages.noListingsInCategory: No listings in this category yet.
publicPages.membersCanPost: Members can post listings and reach the whole community.
publicPages.termsContent1: By using SuperAdPro, you agree to these terms. SuperAdPro is a video advertising and affiliate marketing platform. Members earn commissions by referring others and participating in campaign grids.
publicPages.earningsDisclaimerContent: Participation in the platform involves financial risk and should be treated as a business venture. Past performance of other members is not indicative of your own results.
publicPages.membershipCommContent: Members earn 50% commission when a referred member activates a membership. However, commissions are capped at the referring member's own tier level. A Basic member ($20/mo) earns a maximum of $10 per referral, regardless of the product purchased. A Pro member ($35/mo) earns up to $17.50 per referral. This applies to both initial signups and monthly renewals.
publicPages.upgradePolicyContent: Members upgrading from Basic to Pro pay only the $15 difference between tiers. The upgrade fee goes 100% to the platform and does not generate a commission for the referring sponsor. From the next billing cycle onwards, the member renews at the Pro rate ($35/mo) and the sponsor earns their tier-capped commission on each renewal.
publicPages.campaignTierCommContent: Campaign tier purchases are split as follows: 40% to the direct sponsor, 50% distributed across 8 uni-level tiers (6.25% each), 5% to the grid completion bonus pool, and 5% to the platform. Commission qualification requires an active membership and completion of daily Watch to Earn requirements.
publicPages.campaignViewContent: Each campaign tier includes a set number of video views delivered by the Watch & Earn community. Once the view target has been achieved, the campaign completes. Members may repurchase the same tier to reactivate their commission qualification and submit a new video ad. Grids reactivate automatically upon completion — when a grid reaches 64 members, the completion bonus is paid and a new grid opens. This creates a long-term recurring income opportunity through ongoing repurchase and grid reactivation.
publicPages.courseCommContent: Course sales follow a 100% pass-up system. Sales 1, 3, 5, and 7 are kept by the seller. Sales 2, 4, 6, and 8 pass up to the sponsor in the commission chain.
publicPages.platformRightsContent: SuperAdPro reserves the right to modify, adjust, or update the following at any time, with or without prior notice, in order to maintain the integrity, fairness, and sustainability of the platform:
publicPages.rightsViewTargets: Campaign view targets — the number of views required per campaign tier may be adjusted based on community size and ad-delivery capacity.
publicPages.rightsCommRates: Commission rates and structures — including but not limited to referral percentages, grid commission splits, pass-up patterns, and qualification requirements.
publicPages.rightsMembership: Membership pricing and tier features — including the addition, removal, or modification of platform tools and capabilities included in each tier.
publicPages.rightsPolicies: Platform policies and operational rules — including but not limited to acceptable use policies, withdrawal thresholds, KYC requirements, and content moderation standards.
publicPages.rightsNotice: Any significant changes to commission structures or campaign view targets will be communicated via email and platform notification at least 7 days in advance.
publicPages.privacyContent1: We collect the minimum data necessary to operate the platform - your name, email, and payment information. We use Brevo for email and Cloudflare for security.
publicPages.privacyContent2: We do not sell your data to third parties. We use industry-standard encryption for all sensitive data including KYC documents.
publicPages.acceptableUseContent: Members may not use SuperAdPro to promote illegal products or services, distribute malware, harvest user data, or engage in deceptive marketing practices. Violation may result in account termination.
publicPages.cryptoPaymentsContent: All earnings are paid in USDT on the Polygon blockchain. Cryptocurrency transactions are irreversible. SuperAdPro is not responsible for losses due to incorrect wallet addresses or network errors.
publicPages.kycIntro: SuperAdPro is required to verify the identity of members before processing withdrawals. This helps prevent fraud, comply with international anti-money laundering regulations, and protect the community.
publicPages.kycDocuments: Full legal name, date of birth, and a government-issued photo ID - passport, driving licence, or national ID card.
publicPages.kycUseContent: Your documents are used solely to verify your identity and comply with regulatory requirements. They are never shared with other members or third parties.
publicPages.kycStoreContent: Documents are encrypted and stored securely in Cloudflare R2 object storage. Access is restricted to authorised administrators only.
publicPages.kycRightsContent: You have the right to request access to your personal data, request corrections, or request deletion of your KYC documents at any time by contacting support.
publicPages.kycProcessingContent: KYC applications are typically reviewed within 24-48 hours. You will be notified via email once your verification is approved or if additional documents are required.
publicPages.amlContent1: SuperAdPro is committed to preventing money laundering and the financing of terrorism. We implement appropriate controls to detect and report suspicious activity.
publicPages.amlContent2: We monitor transactions for suspicious activity and reserve the right to freeze accounts, refuse withdrawals, and report suspicious activity to relevant authorities.
publicPages.amlContent3: Members are prohibited from using SuperAdPro to launder funds, obscure the origins of funds, or conduct transactions on behalf of sanctioned individuals or entities.
publicPages.readyToAdvertiseDesc: Create a free account and launch your first campaign today.
publicPages.faqA1: Yes — registering is completely free. You pay for membership ($20/mo Basic or $35/mo Pro) to activate your earning ability and access the platform features.
publicPages.faqA2: Commissions are credited to your platform wallet instantly when they're earned. You can withdraw to your crypto wallet at any time, subject to a minimum withdrawal threshold.
publicPages.faqQ3: What's the difference between Basic and Pro?
publicPages.faqA3: Basic ($20/mo) gives you full affiliate earnings, campaign grid access, and your affiliate link. Pro ($35/mo) adds SuperPages builder, SuperLeads CRM, email autoresponder, lead analytics, and AI content tools.
publicPages.faqQ4: Do I have to recruit people to earn?
publicPages.faqA4: Not exclusively. While referring others accelerates income through membership commissions, you also earn grid completion bonuses driven by your whole team's activity — not just people you personally recruited.
publicPages.faqQ5: How does the campaign grid work?
publicPages.faqA5: Each campaign tier has an 8×8 grid with 64 positions. As members across your network join that tier, positions fill. When all 64 fill, a completion bonus is triggered and paid to the grid owner. A single campaign can complete multiple times.
publicPages.faqA6: When anyone in your network (up to 8 levels deep) makes a grid purchase, you earn 6.25% of that purchase automatically. This means a large team generates passive income for you without any additional effort.
publicPages.faqQ7: What currency are earnings paid in?
publicPages.faqA7: All earnings are in USDT (a dollar-pegged stablecoin) paid on the Base blockchain. You need a compatible crypto wallet to receive withdrawals.
publicPages.faqA8: When you sell a course, you earn a direct commission. Every 3rd sale passes up to your sponsor — who earns a larger commission. This creates a powerful incentive chain.
publicPages.faqQ9: Is there a lock-in period for membership?
publicPages.faqA9: No. Membership is billed monthly with no contract. You can cancel at any time, though your earnings will stop when membership lapses.
publicPages.faqA10: Members can access support through the platform's help system. You can also reach us through the contact page.
publicPages.advertiserDesc: SuperAdPro members watch videos as part of earning campaigns. Your ads get genuine attention from motivated viewers.
publicPages.genuineViewsDesc: Members are incentivised to watch fully — no bots, no skipping, no fake engagement.
publicPages.motivatedAudienceDesc: Our members are entrepreneurs and business-minded individuals — a high-quality demographic.
publicPages.transparentReportingDesc: Track your views, engagement, and campaign performance in real time.
publicPages.costEffectiveDesc: Competitive CPM rates with guaranteed view delivery across our member network.
publicPages.recurringExposureDesc: Members return daily to watch campaigns — your brand gets repeated exposure.
publicPages.fastSetupDesc: Submit your video, set your budget, and go live within 24 hours.
